sp_widget.description: Created new modal based off Tasker Modal - Reopen Tasks. The new modal will show Response Comments; Reviewer Comments and Rework Comments.
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Response Comments
sp_widget.template:
{{data.name.label}}
{{data.number.label}}
{{data.name.displayValue}}
{{data.number.displayValue}}
{{data.assignedTo.label}}
{{data.state.label}}
{{data.assignedTo.displayValue}}
{{data.state.displayValue}} {{data.state.displayValue}}
{{item.label}}
